title: K-200 Systems Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Systems Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-457-F. Revision: F. Type: ICD. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2024-05-21. Last modified: 2024-12-25. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1051, P-1140, P-1063, P-1039.
